SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo

Class DigSiteGridWithSquares

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid
edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo.DigSiteGridWithSquares
public class DigSiteGridWithSquares extends DigSiteGrid
POJO (Plain Old Java Object) extending DigSiteGrid to include its associated squares. Used by Room for transactional queries that retrieve a grid along with all its squares.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DigSiteGridWithSquares()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<DigSiteSquare>
    getDigSiteSquares()
    Gets the list of dig site squares associated with this grid.
    Map<DigSiteCoord,DigSiteSquare>
    getGridSquares()
    Converts the list of squares into a map keyed by their coordinates for efficient lookup.
    Set<DigSiteCoord>
    getMooreNeighbors(DigSiteCoord coord)
    Retrieves the Moore neighborhood (8 surrounding squares) for a given coordinate, filtering out coordinates that don't exist in the grid.
    void
    setDigSiteSquares(List<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)
    Sets the list of dig site squares associated with this grid.

  • Method Details

    • setDigSiteSquares

      public void setDigSiteSquares(List<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)
      Sets the list of dig site squares associated with this grid.
      Parameters:
      digSiteSquares - List of squares.

    • getDigSiteSquares

      public List<DigSiteSquare> getDigSiteSquares()
      Gets the list of dig site squares associated with this grid.
      Returns:
      List of squares.

    • getGridSquares

      public Map<DigSiteCoord,DigSiteSquare> getGridSquares()
      Converts the list of squares into a map keyed by their coordinates for efficient lookup.
      Returns:
      Map of coordinates to dig site squares.

    • getMooreNeighbors

      public Set<DigSiteCoord> getMooreNeighbors(DigSiteCoord coord)
      Retrieves the Moore neighborhood (8 surrounding squares) for a given coordinate, filtering out coordinates that don't exist in the grid.
      Parameters:
      coord - Center coordinate.
      Returns:
      Set of valid neighboring coordinates.
